query: SELECT c.id, c.valorVenda, l.nome as lead_nome, l.corretorId, u.name as corretor_nome, u.equipeId FROM contratos c LEFT JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id WHERE u.equipeId = 30001 ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT c.id, c.valorVenda, l.nome as lead_nome, l.corretorId, u.name as corretor_nome, u.equipeId FROM contratos c LEFT JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id WHERE u.equipeId = 30001 ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
